title: Submit a prediction and see it reflected on the dashboard
description: This test verifies that a prediction user can complete the prediction form on the dashboard and see the saved prediction in the dashboard state.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the prediction dashboard is displayed
Fill in a valid prediction for a match
Submit the prediction form
Verify the submitted prediction appears in the dashboard state

title: Open the home page and reach the match schedule
description: This test verifies that a visitor can load the home page, see the core landing content, and navigate to the match schedule from the main navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the main hero and feature sections
Verify the landing page hero and key promotional sections are displayed
Click the navigation link to view the match schedule
Verify the schedule page is displayed

title: View the global rankings and points
description: This verifies that a visitor can open the leaderboard and review ranked entries with points and standings.

steps.description: Navigate to /leaderboard
Verify leaderboard entries are displayed
Verify points and ranking position are displayed

title: Browse the match schedule and open a match
description: This test verifies that a user can view the full schedule, open a match item, and see the match details needed to understand the fixture.

steps.description: Navigate to /matches
Verify a list of FIFA World Cup 2026 matches is displayed
Open a match item from the schedule
Verify the match detail view shows the teams, date, time, and venue

title: Review the leaderboard and standings
description: This test verifies that a rankings viewer can open the leaderboard and see the current rankings, points, and top entries.

steps.description: Navigate to /leaderboard
Verify the rankings leaderboard is displayed
Verify the user standing and top-ranked entries are displayed

title: See the current standing on the leaderboard
description: This verifies that a user can find their own standing within the leaderboard list.

steps.description: Navigate to /leaderboard
Verify the user's standing is displayed
Verify the top-ranked entries are displayed

title: Open the leaderboard from home navigation
description: This verifies that a visitor can reach the leaderboard through the app navigation from the home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to view the leaderboard
Verify the leaderboard page is displayed
Verify leaderboard entries are displayed

title: See the home page call-to-action placeholders
description: This test verifies that a visitor can open the home page and use the placeholder login or join actions without leaving the marketing site.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the login placeholder action
Verify the marketing site remains displayed
Click the join now placeholder action
Verify the marketing site remains displayed

title: View the home page ranking preview
description: This test verifies that a visitor can see the top-ranked users preview on the home page as part of the landing experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the rankings preview section
Verify the top three users preview is displayed

title: Recover from an invalid route back to home
description: This test verifies that a visitor landing on an unknown route sees a recovery state and can return to the home page using site navigation.

steps.description: Navigate to /unknown-route
Verify a 404 page is displayed
Click the navigation link to return home
Verify the home page is displayed

title: See validation feedback for an incomplete prediction
description: This test verifies that the dashboard blocks an incomplete prediction submission and shows validation feedback to guide the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify the prediction dashboard is displayed
Submit the prediction form without completing required fields
Verify validation feedback is displayed

title: See an empty or error state when rankings are unavailable
description: This verifies that the leaderboard page shows a clear empty state or error message when ranking data does not render.

steps.description: Navigate to /leaderboard
Verify an empty state message is visible or a rankings error message is visible

title: See the schedule empty state when matches are unavailable
description: This test verifies that the schedule page presents a clear empty or error state when no match items can be shown to the user.

steps.description: Navigate to /matches
Verify the schedule page content is displayed
Verify an empty state or error state is displayed instead of match items

title: Recover to the home page from an invalid route
description: This verifies that a visitor landing on an invalid path sees a 404 page and can navigate back to the home page.

steps.description: Navigate to a valid unknown route
Verify a 404 page is displayed
Click the link to return to the home page
Verify the home page is displayed
